name: Mercury Web Parser API
description: Mercury Parser extracts meaningful content from any URL. It returns article content, titles, authors, published dates, excerpts, lead images, and more. Originally a hosted API by Postlight, Mercury is now an open-source library. This spec documents the hosted API interface that was available at mercury.postlight.com.
